steps.title: Find the central focus
steps.content: The text begins by introducing a runestone discovered in Norway and dated to 1–250 CE. The remaining sentences describe what's notable about it (possibly the earliest written words in Scandinavia) and what it could teach researchers.

steps.title: Match to the broadest accurate topic
steps.content:
B (Iron Age battles) and D (a new dating method) aren't discussed. C (Zilmer's research interests) is too narrow — Zilmer is just one person quoted.

A (a runestone found in Norway) captures the entire passage's subject. A is correct.
